title: Incorrect values in trace from variable written with blocking assignment in process with various timing controls

features.name: blocking assignment with mixed timing controls in clocked process
features.description: Code should include a blocking assignment to a logic signal inside an always block that uses both event control @(posedge clk) and blocking delay (#1 or #10) as timing controls

features.name: forever loop with blocking assignments and timing controls
features.description: Code should include a forever loop where blocking assignments to logic variables are interleaved with timing controls like @(posedge clk) and for-loop delays

features.name: trace of blocking-assigned variable with post-clock #1 delay
features.description: Code should include a logic variable assigned via blocking assignment after @(posedge clk); #1; sequence, with FST tracing enabled
